case_title: ROBIN YANG VS. VIVA SOMA INC DBA PARK CENTRAL HOTEL SF

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-25-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VIVA SOMA INC DBA PARK CENTRAL HOTEL SF
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANG, ROBIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIVA SOMA INC DBA PARK CENTRAL HOTEL SF $3,426.72 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,491.72, FOR FAILURE TO GARNISH WAGES AS REQUIRED BY LAW PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 706.154(A) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YANG, ROBIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,426.72 FILED BY YANG, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT VIVA SOMA INC DBA PARK CENTRAL HOTEL SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT VIVA SOMA INC DBA PARK CENTRAL HOTEL SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF ROBIN YANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
